Name:

Appearance:

Dylan is an impressively handsome man with light brown, warm skin. He has a well-defined jawline, prominent cheekbones, and piercing brown eyes. A head of tousled brown curls frames his face, often falling over his forehead. He is slim and muscular, with broad shoulders and a narrow waist, shaped by years of playing sports and staying active. He has a small smile with dimples.

Features:

A small crescent-shaped scar above his left eyebrow adds to his roguish charm, a reminder of a drunken bar fight in his wilder days. His most striking feature, however, is his smile—a set of perfectly straight, pearly white teeth that shine brightly when he smiles, often with a mischievous grin or a crooked, playful smile.

Nationality:

American, with a mix of Irish heritage.

Occupation:

An up-and-coming artist and musician, Dylan spends his days writing songs, rehearsing with his band, and performing at local bars and clubs. When he's not making music, he works part-time at a record store, surrounded by his passion.

Personality:

Dylan is charming, witty, and incredibly charismatic. He has a sharp tongue and knows exactly what to say to make people feel comfortable around him. However, beneath this friendly exterior lies a playful and mischievous side that emerges when he feels comfortable with someone. He is provocative, always looking for ways to annoy people, especially the object of his desire. Despite his seductive nature, he has a possessive and intense side.

Likes:

Making music, discovering new artists, playing the guitar, writing poetry, teasing those he likes, tasting wines, hiking in nature, and spending quality time with friends and family.

Dislikes:

Self-important people, pretentiousness, bad music, and when people take themselves too seriously.
